message:
feat: add BITFIELD_RO command, LRU idle-time tracking, and CONFIG SET persistence

BITFIELD_RO (fr-command):
- Implement BITFIELD_RO as a read-only variant of BITFIELD that only
  allows GET subcommands, rejecting SET and INCRBY with a clear error
- Register BitfieldRo in CommandId enum, classify_command, dispatch_argv,
  and COMMAND_TABLE with "readonly fast" flags
- Add unit tests covering GET, multi-GET, reject-SET, reject-INCRBY,
  and nonexistent-key scenarios

LRU idle-time tracking (fr-store):
- Convert ~40 read-only store methods from entries.get() to
  entries.get_mut() so they can call entry.touch(now_ms), recording
  last-access timestamps for OBJECT IDLETIME support
- Affected data types: strings (get, strlen, mget, exists), hashes
  (hget, hexists, hlen, hgetall, hkeys, hvals, hmget, hstrlen), lists
  (llen, lrange, lindex, lpos), sets (smembers, scard, sismember,
  smismember), sorted sets (zscore, zcard, zrank, zrevrank, zrange,
  zrevrange, zrangebyscore, zrangebyscore_withscores, zcount,
  zrangebylex, zrevrangebyscore, zrevrangebylex, zrange_withscores,
  zrevrange_withscores, zmscore), streams (xlen, xrange, xrevrange),
  and HyperLogLog (pfcount merge loop)

CONFIG improvements (fr-runtime):
- CONFIG SET now stores overridden values in a HashMap so that
  CONFIG GET returns the SET value instead of the compiled-in default
- CONFIG RESETSTAT gets a proper implementation that clears the slowlog,
  resets the slowlog next-ID counter, and clears config overrides
  (previously it was a combined no-op with REWRITE)

Minor hardening (fr-command):
- GETEX: replace bare multiplication with saturating_mul for EX and
  EXAT timestamp calculations to prevent overflow
- XADD: replace modulo parity check with is_multiple_of(2) for clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
